questions.question: The “Garba” folk dance that is seen in the news recently, is associated with which state?
questions.explanation: The “Garba” is a form of folk dance of Gujarat. It is performed during the 9-day celebration of the Navratri festival, in the worship of Goddess Shakti / Durga. Recently, the Government of Gujarat has disallowed performance of the Garba dance during this year’s Navratri festival, as a part of Covid management in the state.

questions.question: Which financial institution has signed USD 270 million loan to strengthen Urban local bodies in Madhya Pradesh?
questions.explanation: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) and the Government of India on Monday signed a USD 270 million loan to strengthen the urban local bodies in Madhya Pradesh.The loan amount will be deployed to develop water supply and integrated storm-water and sewage management infrastructure. The Madhya Pradesh Urban Services Improvement Project was earlier approved in 2017 with a USD 275 million loan.

questions.question: Which PSU has won the National Awards for Excellence in PSU in the Investment in Start-Ups Category?
questions.explanation: The team TRIFED Warriors has bagged the “National Awards for Excellence – PSU” in the Investment in Start-Ups Category. The awards are hosted by the World HRD Congress to recognize the outstanding initiatives taken by Government departments, Public Sector Units and industries. TRIFED won in three categories: CEO of the Year, Visionary Leadership Award and Investment in Start-Ups.

questions.question: Which Power producer of India has tied up with Cement manufacturers across the country for supply of ash?
questions.explanation: India’s largest power producer NTPC Ltd has tied up with Cement manufacturers across the country to supply fly ash. This is a part of NTPC’s objective to achieve % by-product utilisation. NTPC is using the services of Indian Railways to transport fly ash from its thermal power plants to various cement plants. NTPC Rihand is the first power plant in Uttar Pradesh to send conditioned fly ash to cement manufacturers.

questions.question: The Central government has allowed how many states to borrow Rs.68,825 crore from the market?
questions.explanation: The Union Government has allowed 20 states to raise Rs.68,825 crore from the market through open market borrowing. This would help the states to bridge the GST revenue shortfall. The estimated shortfall in GST compensation to states is Rs.2.35 lakh crore. The central Government had given 2 options to the states – either borrower Rs.97,000 crore through a special window of RBI or borrower Rs.2.35 lakh crore from the market.

questions.question: In which state/UT, was the operation of first phase of International Institute of Advanced Virology (IIAV) inaugurated?
questions.explanation: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan has recently inaugurated operations of the first phase of the International Institute of Advanced Virology.It has been located at the Life Science Park at Thonakkal in Thiruvananthapuram. Renowned virologist, Dr Akhil Banerjee was appointed as the Head of the research Institute, which is currently under the Department of Science and Technology.

questions.question: The Parliament of Israel has approved Peace Deal with which country?
questions.explanation: Israel’s parliament has recently approved the normalization deal signed between Israel and the United Arab Emirates (UAE).Israel and the UAE signed an agreement to normalize their relations in Washington on September 15. Israel also signed a peace deal with Bahrain and the UAE and Bahrain became the first Gulf countries to agree for official relations with Israel.

questions.question: New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern, who won a second term, belongs to which party?
questions.explanation: New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern has won a landslide victory in the country’s general election.Jacinda Ardern belongs to the Labour Party, which won 49.1% in the election to bring an estimated 64 seats and a complete parliamentary majority. The opposition centre-right National Party won 26.8% in the poll with 35 seats.

questions.question: Which country is to resume its oil & gas exploration in disputed South China Sea after a six-year moratorium?
questions.explanation: The Philippines announced that it will resume oil and gas exploration in the South China Sea, by ending a six-year moratorium on resource exploration.Former President Benigno Aquino III suspended exploration in the disputed sea in 2014 amid tensions with China. The United States had also supported Philippines against the move of China.

questions.question: Which company has been awarded the contract by NASA for deploying 4G network on Moon?
questions.explanation: The US space agency NASA has awarded a contract to Nokia for deploying 4G network on Moon. The proposed communication system in moon would be used for lunar surface communications at greater distances. This is a part of USD 370 million worth of contracts signed under NASA’s “Tipping Point” selections, aimed at advanced space research and exploration.
